title: Egyptian Aubergine Crumble
description: A delicious and flavorful vegetarian dish inspired by Egyptian cuisine, featuring roasted aubergine topped with a crunchy crumble mixture.
instructions: Cut the aubergine into 1-inch cubes and place on a baking sheet.
Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with minced garlic and chopped onion.
Roast in the oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the aubergine is tender.
While the aubergine is roasting, mix the crumble with grated cheese.
Once the aubergine is done, top it with the crumble mixture and return to the oven for an additional 5-10 minutes, or until the crumble is golden brown.
